input_text: A mother saw a man. John was yellow. Mike is an elephant. The teacher showed the students a large map. Sue is a true patriot. Eve kept the milk in the fridge. Clinton defeated Dole. Tom opened the door and the window. Emajogi is 20 meters long. Sandra went back to the bathroom. The cup filled with water fell. A village road was narrow. Muggles can not disappear. Tallinn is in Estonia. A very big mouse is nice. Cats are afraid of wolves. A promotion was given to Mary. The mouse is a very big mouse?
